title: Sirenhead: Legacy
description: Added siren head and cartoon cat [bosses]
body:
![Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca100f65b7fbe8888fedcdc938cde49c946db75.png)

Added Siren Head And Cartoon Cat

Information:

  Siren Head: 

   Health:1000

   Damage:10

   Armor:100

 This is a powerful boss, it can attack in a wide range, run faster than the player, it can knock enemies up or pick up some entities. Siren Head has 25 different skills. Siren head makes many different sounds.

 

  Cartoon Cat:

   Health:500

   Damage:19

   Armor:100  

 This is an extremely strong boss, has high counterattack, runs as fast as the player, has many skills. Cartoon Cat has a speed of damaging enemies quite quickly.
  

Siren Head and Cartoon Cat - Trevor Henderson

 


Feedback: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sirenhead-legacy
